ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone used for the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pilot flying the drone */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation environment */,
  "flight_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the flight (e.g., manual, autonomous) */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., completed, aborted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_name" TEXT /* Name of the drone */,
  "drone_type" TEXT /* Type of drone (e.g., quadcopter, hexacopter) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the drone */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the drone */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the pilot (e.g., beginner, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions for the simulation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed for the simulation */,
  "air_density" REAL /* Air density for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "flight_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the drone */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the drone */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the drone */,
  "phi" REAL /* Roll angle of the drone */,
  "theta" REAL /* Pitch angle of the drone */,
  "psi" REAL /* Yaw angle of the drone */,
  "x_velocity" REAL /* X-component of velocity */,
  "y_velocity" REAL /* Y-component of velocity */,
  "z_velocity" REAL /* Z-component of velocity */,
  "x_accel" REAL /* X-component of acceleration */,
  "y_accel" REAL /* Y-component of acceleration */,
  "z_accel" REAL /* Z-component of acceleration */,
  "phi_velocity" REAL /* Roll rate of the drone */,
  "theta_velocity" REAL /* Pitch rate of the drone */,
  "psi_velocity" REAL /* Yaw rate of the drone */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* Battery voltage of the drone */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_inputs" (
  "control_input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control input entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "rotor_speed1" REAL /* Speed of rotor 1 */,
  "rotor_speed2" REAL /* Speed of rotor 2 */,
  "rotor_speed3" REAL /* Speed of rotor 3 */,
  "rotor_speed4" REAL /* Speed of rotor 4 */,
  "collective_pitch" REAL /* Collective pitch angle */,
  "cyclic_pitch" REAL /* Cyclic pitch angle */,
  "roll_input" REAL /* Roll input */,
  "pitch_input" REAL /* Pitch input */,
  "yaw_input" REAL /* Yaw input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_inputs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_parameters" (
  "flight_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight parameter entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward value for the flight */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled by the drone */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Energy consumed by the drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_parameters_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, pilot) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drone_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., motor, ESC) */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_components_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk (e.g., weather, air traffic) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of the risk (e.g., low, high) */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_risks_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the drone used for the flight
Reference to the pilot flying the drone
Mode of the flight (e.g., manual, autonomous)
Status of the flight (e.g., completed, aborted)
Experience level of the pilot (e.g., beginner, expert)

Unique identifier for each control input entry
Unique identifier for each flight parameter entry
Role of the user (e.g., admin, pilot)
Unique identifier for each access event
